concern_note: Orion: 3004 Entity Management is for IoT/managed devices; 3001 Account Change or 3006 Group Management more appropriate for Azure AD user/group events. Kept because this is Observo production ship.
Orion: 2001 Security Finding is generic for Netskope CASB; 2004 Detection Finding or 4002 HTTP Activity more precise. Kept because this is Observo production ship.
Orion: 99602001 is non-standard SentinelOne extended UID; standard OCSF mapping is 2004 Detection Finding. Kept because this is SentinelOne-extended OCSF by design.
Orion: 6001 Web Resource is wrong for Tenable scan results; 2002 Vulnerability Finding more appropriate. Kept because this is Observo production ship.
Metrics/telemetry ≠ process activity; 5001 Device Inventory Info more appropriate than 1007
OCSF has 4004 DHCP Activity; script uses 3002 Authentication
AD audit events are user/group changes; 3001 Account Change or 3004 Entity Management more appropriate than 1007
For non-alert email events, 4009 Email Activity more specific than 2004
For non-alert email events, 4009 Email Activity more specific than 2004
